text: Walking through these sliding glass doors and encountering the R+D exhibit, I am struck by anticipation and curiosity. The air feels charged with possibility; something new is being unveiled here. The bold letters and illuminated text promise invention and synergy between humanity and technology. I feel alert, eager, yet slightly unsettled by the artificial lighting and the abundance of screens—reminders that progress is both inviting and disorienting. There is an odd calm inside me, mingled with the flutter of discovery.
